name: {number} prompts de fotos de hombres de negocios
summary: Crea retratos ejecutivos pulidos y con autoridad sin necesidad de fotógrafos costosos. 📷 Nuestro libro de prompts, cuidadosamente elaborado, incluye {number} prompts probados y optimizados para Gemini, Nano Banana y Higgsfield, totalmente compatibles con herramientas de referencia de personajes para obtener resultados consistentes y realistas. ⚡ Descarga digital instantánea.
description: Este completo libro de prompts contiene {number} prompts de IA meticulosamente diseñados, creados específicamente para generar retratos profesionales de hombres de negocios listos para sala de juntas que transmiten autoridad, competencia y presencia ejecutiva.
prompt: A professional man seated in a studio, slightly turned toward the camera with a composed expression, captured on an 85mm lens with shallow depth of field and soft Rembrandt lighting from camera left, balanced by gentle fill, minimalistic refined mood, realistic textures, confident corporate tone, clean background, no text or logos.
why: A single professional executive headshot session costs $500–$1,500. Add multiple outfit changes, location variations, professional retouching ($200–$400), and you're easily looking at $2,000–$3,000 for a comprehensive portfolio. Then what happens when you need fresh photos in six months? You start over. 😤But what if you could generate studio-quality executive portraits whenever you need them—in minutes, for a fraction of the cost? ✨
